Queen's Blessing.name: Queen's Blessing
Queen's Blessing.description: At the start of the turn, restore HP to friendly units within a range of 700, with the amount equal to 20% of the Pet's HP limit, and grant the healed units a 15% damage reduction effect for 1 turn.

Advanced Support Skill.name: Advanced Support Skill
Advanced Support Skill.activation: When the master takes damage, it triggers.
Advanced Support Skill.description: Share the 48% damage taken by the owner.

Advanced Soul Sharing.name: Advanced Soul Sharing
Advanced Soul Sharing.activation: When the master takes damage, it triggers.
Advanced Soul Sharing.description: Share the 30% damage taken by the owner.
